intro: Turn up the fun with a musical adventure the whole family will love!
description:
Unleash your little ones’ musical talent with Monstar Karaoke Party, the perfect educational karaoke game for the entire family!
Join five mischievous and lovable little monsters on a musical adventure where they’ll learn to overcome their fears, explore the world and discover the importance of teamwork.
Sing, laugh and learn along with the catchiest songs ever!

Meet your new singing buddies!

• Family fun: A friendly, safe and perfect game mode for enjoying a fun afternoon together in the living room watching TV.

• Education and values: Every song shares valuable life lessons about respecting nature, personal growth and perseverance.

• Fully accessible: Text and songs adapted for beginning readers.

• Visually spectacular: Dynamic, colorful music videos packed with animations kids will absolutely love.
